message:
feat(core): add edit_distance module for sequence comparison algorithms

Levenshtein, Damerau-Levenshtein, Hamming, LCS, Jaro-Winkler, bounded
and weighted variants, edit scripts, n-gram similarity, nearest neighbors.
47 inline tests + 40 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
